meta.subtitle: v10.0 — 企业化升级 (深耕 16 项做透 + 修复 5 审计 Top 50)
meta.supersedes: v8.1 todo.json (16 tasks, 全部完成)

stack.backend: FastAPI + Python 3.12 + ServiceToggle + Mem0 + LlamaIndex + EventBus
stack.frontend: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind + next-intl + Storybook + TanStack Query
stack.infra: Supabase Postgres + pgvector + Redis Streams + Qdrant

goal: 不造新功能。把 v9.1 16 项做透 + 5 份审计 Top 50 问题修复 + 真实业务化(RAG/Multi-Agent/Mem0/Workflow/plugin 沙箱/前端 loading+error+TanStack Query+SEO+i18n+SAML 安全/KMS+tenant_id 全覆盖+索引/缓存/分区)。v10.0 = 企业化升级。
out_of_scope: 新业务功能 (16 项已覆盖)
商业化 tier / 合同 / billing (P3 之后再开)
新数据库 / 新 LLM provider (除 Anomaly / Vllm / LocalAI)

P0_phase0_backend.name: 后端企业化 (P0 修复)
P0_phase0_backend.scope: Agent gateway 改造、Service 层拆分、API 契约治理、Provider 失败处理、基础设施状态分布式化

P1_phase1_frontend.name: 前端企业化 (P0/P1 修复)
P1_phase1_frontend.scope: loading.tsx/error.tsx 全覆盖、TanStack Query 集成、SEO metadata 全覆盖、react-hook-form + Zod、表单/i18n/Storybook 100% 覆盖、Mobile/A11y/Perf/Dark mode

P2_phase2_db_perf.name: 数据库 + 性能
P2_phase2_db_perf.scope: tenant_id 全表覆盖、触发器函数去重、12 复合/部分/INCLUDE 索引、HNSW 调参、pgvector 缓存、备份灾备 SOP

P3_phase3_security_compliance.name: 安全 + 合规
P3_phase3_security_compliance.scope: PII 加密 fail-fast + KMS、JWT 默认 secret 删 + SAML 签名校验、GPDR Art.15/17/30/33 完整、CCPA opt-out、3 层 rate limit、prompt injection 防护、PIPL 数据出境

P4_phase4_ai_business.name: AI 集成真实业务化
P4_phase4_ai_business.scope: RAG 真模型 + 多租户隔离、Mem0 pgvector RPC、Multi-Agent 真实 LLM executor + 4 场景、Plugin 容器化 + 签名、Workflow 持久化 + cycle/timeout、EventBus Redis Streams + DLQ

tasks.title: Agent Gateway 强契约化
tasks.description: 16 个 Agent 全部 hardcoded prompt + JSON.loads → 强制 AgentRuntime 契约。AgentInput/Output Pydantic v2 模型 + token/byte cap + PII policy + Provider 原生 structured output + Pydantic 二次验证;失败仅 repair/retry,之后走 degraded/fallback(可审计)。
deliverables: backend/agents/contracts.py: AgentInputModel / AgentOutputModel 基类
backend/agents/runtime.py: 强制契约 + 错误分类 (degraded/retryable/source/confidence)
16 个 *_agent.py 全部改造 (移除模块级 PROMPT 常量 → PromptRegistry)
tests/test_agent_contracts.py 100+ 测试 (含 PII policy + injection scenario)

tasks.title: Service 层拆分 + 错误统一
tasks.description: >400 行 Service 拆分;874 个 except Exception 收口;统一错误信封 (error_code/request_id/details/retryable)。删除根目录兼容 forwarding 层,建立 application/domain/infrastructure 三层 import graph。
deliverables: collaboration_room 1115 行 → 拆 Room + Thread + Member + Reaction + Mention (5 文件)
predictive 846 行 → 拆 Model + Forecast + Calibration 3 文件
service_toggle 792 行 → 拆 Registry + Gate + Dependency 三层
billing 681 行 → 拆 Subscription + Invoice + Usage
统一 envelope {code, message, request_id, details, retryable}
tests/test_error_envelope.py + tests/test_service_splits.py 100+ 测试

tasks.title: API 契约治理 + tenant 强制
tasks.description: 640 路由 → 100% request/response Pydantic 模型 + 显式 auth/tenant/entitlement dependency;CI AST 检查 + OpenAPI diff gate 阻止破坏性变更;tenant_context manager 替代隐式 middleware。
deliverables: 每个非公开路由显式 auth+tenant+entitlement dependency
每路由 Pydantic request/response model + examples + operation_id
tenant_context(ctx) context-manager 替代隐式 middleware,所有 Supabase call 必须在 manager 内
CI:openapi-diff 阻止破坏性变更;lint 规则检查每个 router 必须有 response_model
88 个路由文件 + 96 个 response_model 缺口全补
tests/test_api_tenant_isolation.py 跨租户拒绝测试

tasks.title: Provider + Plugin 弹性 + 沙箱重设计
tasks.description: Provider contract:统一 timeout/retry-after/idempotency/error taxonomy + mock 显式禁用。Plugin:强制独立容器/微 VM + 默认 deny egress + 签名验证 + Windows Job Object polyfill。Anthropic Provider 重写为 adaptive thinking + structured output + streaming + typed exceptions。
deliverables: providers/base.py: 统一 ProviderContract + 显式 mock gate
providers/llm/anthropic_provider.py: 重写 (Claude 4.x + adaptive thinking + structured output)
plugins/sdk/sandbox.py: 强制 PluginContainerRunner (Docker/gVisor) + NetworkGuard 默认 deny
plugins/sdk/manifest.py: SignatureVerifier (SHA-256 / minisign / cosign)
Windows Job Object polyfill + secrets from Secret Manager (Vault/AWS SM)
tests/test_provider_contracts.py + tests/test_plugin_sandbox.py 100+ 测试

tasks.title: 横切状态分布式化 + 可观测性生产门禁
tasks.description: FeatureFlag/Config/ServiceToggle 在 Redis 故障时 fail-closed (安全/计费) / fail-open (UI);消除 flushdb 风险。Observability production profile 下启动失败 fail-fast;100% 请求 trace 关联 trace_id/tenant_id/route/prompt_version;Prometheus 增加 degraded / provider_mock_fallback / queue_lag 指标。结构化 JSON 日志 + redaction。
deliverables: platform/feature_flag.py: Redis CAS + 区分 fail-open/fail-closed;flushdb 禁用
platform/service_toggle.py: 进程内 registry fallback + Redis atomic
platform/config_service.py: schema 校验 + 双人审批 + secret redaction
observability/telemetry.py: production fail-fast + trace_id 强制 + PII scrubber
prometheus 增加 provider_mock_fallback / degraded / queue_lag / tenant_safe 标签
structlog 统一 JSON + contextvars 注入
tests/test_state_distribution.py + tests/test_obs_failfast.py 60+

tasks.title: 全局 ErrorBoundary + loading.tsx/error.tsx 覆盖
tasks.description: 零 loading.tsx / zero error.tsx / no global ErrorBoundary → 任意 API 慢 30s 空白,任意 component throw 全 white screen。补 root segment global-error.tsx + 5 个 layout 级 loading.tsx + ErrorBoundary 包装组件。所有 page.tsx 走 Suspense + streaming。
deliverables: app/global-error.tsx (root segment, catch-all)
app/error.tsx (root segment)
app/(public)/loading.tsx + app/(authenticated)/loading.tsx + app/jobseeker/loading.tsx + app/employer/loading.tsx + app/admin/loading.tsx + app/mothership/loading.tsx
<AppErrorBoundary /> 包装组件 + ErrorState 真正应用 (修复 0 hits)
key dashboard pages Suspense + streaming
双 layout 去重:删除 app/employer/** 平行 12 路由保留 (employer)/
tests/test_error_boundary.spec.ts + Playwright per persona smoke

tasks.title: TanStack Query + 数据获取层 + mock 隔离
tasks.description: 50+ lib/api-*.ts 直接 fetch → 全部转 useQuery hooks;QueryClient 集中 (retry/staleTime/cacheTime);React Query Devtools。mock-data.ts 4193 行不再 import 进生产:lazy import + env gate;api.ts interceptor 自动 fallback。
deliverables: @tanstack/react-query v5 引入 + Provider + Devtools
50+ api-*.ts 改 useQuery hooks (useCandidates、useRoles、useMatching…)
lib/api.ts 加 mockApi interceptor + NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_MOCK env gate
lib/api-mock.ts 改为 NODE_ENV !== production 才 lazy import
mock-data.ts 4193 行压缩到 seed.json 供 Storybook/fixture
delete imports 直接 from '@/lib/mock-data' (CI lint 拦截)
tests/test_data_layer.spec.tsx + MSW 替代 mock-data

tasks.title: SEO metadata + i18n 全覆盖 + form 表单
tasks.description: 170 page 中 5 个 metadata → 90 个公开/SEO 重要页面加 generateMetadata() + JsonLd。170 页面 + 100 组件中 useTranslations 5 处 → 80% 覆盖率;ESLint fail build on hardcoded string。50+ 表单加 react-hook-form + Zod(与 backend Pydantic 同步生成 Zod schema)。

90 个 page.tsx 加 generateMetadata + JsonLd (含 og:image / canonical / hreflang)

tasks.title: Storybook + 设计系统 + Mobile + A11y + 性能 + Dark mode

ESLint:no-restricted-syntax 禁 inline hex(in tokens.ts 除外)

tasks.description: RedisEventBus 改 Redis Streams(XADD + consumer group + DLQ XADD events:dlq);eventbus/schemas.py Pydantic EventPayload (16 个)+ schema_version;Event 增加 schema_version 字段;consumer 失败 N 次入 DLQ;CI orphan producer/consumer check。

tests/test_eventbus_dlq.py + tests/test_eventbus_schema.py

tasks.title: Prompt v2 eval runner + 热更新 + cost/tokens
tasks.description: PromptService 改为订阅 config.changed event;新增 prompt_evaluator.py 定时跑 golden set 4 维度(accuracy/fluency/safety/bias) + 自动 record_metric;render() 加 {{schema_version}} 占位符 + token / cost 字段。
deliverables: platform/prompt_v2.py: 订阅 config.changed(scope=prompt) + 清缓存 + reload

metrics/prompt_eval_dashboard.json (Grafana)
tests/test_prompt_hot_reload.py + tests/test_prompt_evaluator.py

tasks.title: Provider with_resilience mock_fallback 分类 + RAG query_stream 真 stream
tasks.description: Provider 内部 fallback 时返回 _MockFallback sentinel;_run 检测到 metrics observe mock_fallback 分类;RAG query_stream(generator) 接真实 LLM stream API(OpenAI/Anthropic stream) → 真实 TTFT。
deliverables: providers/base.py: _MockFallback sentinel + metrics{status=mock_fallback}
services/rag/service.py: query_stream 接真 LLM stream(OpenAI stream / Anthropic stream)
providers/llm/openai_provider.py: stream() async generator + structured output
tests/test_provider_mock_fallback_metric.py + tests/test_rag_stream_latency.py

tasks.title: v10.0.0 Release 集成验证 + 文档 + Release notes
tasks.description: 5 phases 完成后的端到端集成:backend pytest 全量 + coverage.py >=85%;frontend tsc + next build + Playwright per persona + Lighthouse CI;安全 SOC2 evidence 打包;sre runbook 更新;docs 同步(README / ARCHITECTURE / COMPONENTS / SERVICE_TOGGLE / DEPTH_PLAN);分批 commit + push + v10.0.0 GitHub Release。
deliverables: backend pytest 全量 + coverage.py >=85%(核心安全/计费/租户/Agent runtime/provider/workflow 模块分支 >=90%)
frontend tsc --noEmit + next build + Playwright per persona smoke(5×5=25 用例)
Lighthouse CI:performance >=90 / a11y >=95 / SEO >=95 / best-practices >=95
sre runbook + on-call 手册 + DR 演练报告
docs/README.md + ARCHITECTURE.md + COMPONENTS.md + I18N_GUIDE.md 更新 + COVERAGE-AUDIT-v10.md 引用 + RELEASE_NOTES_v10.0.0.md
Agent A/B 分批 commit + push + GitHub Actions 全绿 + v10.0.0 GitHub Release
